def negative_observability_metric_names_use_inconsistent_separators():
    rule_id = "observability_metric_names_use_inconsistent_separators"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Metric names in the same codebase mix dot and underscore separators."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
